title: chargeback — settings
description: Tenant-facing preferences (rate monitoring thresholds, RDR configuration, evidence collection defaults, notification cadence, retention window). No user-level preferences — chargebacks are admin-managed workflows, not user preferences.

fields.name: rate_monitoring_enabled
fields.label: Enable rate monitoring
fields.helpText: Monitor rolling 60-day chargeback rate per network. Alerts when rate crosses VDMP/MDMP threshold. Recommended ON — merchant-account termination risk if unmonitored.

fields.name: custom_threshold_visa_percent
fields.label: Visa VDMP threshold override (percent)
fields.helpText: Override the default 0.9% Visa VDMP threshold. Enterprise tenants may enforce stricter internal thresholds (0.5% early-warning). Cannot exceed 5.0% (would be effectively disabled).

fields.name: rdr_enabled
fields.label: Enable RDR
fields.helpText: Auto-refund below threshold to close pre-chargeback state. No network fee. No rate impact. Visa-only.

fields.name: rdr_auto_refund_threshold_cents
fields.label: RDR auto-refund threshold (cents)
fields.helpText: Chargebacks below this amount become RDR-eligible for auto-refund. Default 5000 = $50. Small tenants may raise to $100; enterprise may lower to $25.

fields.name: rdr_min_customer_purchase_history_days
fields.label: Min customer purchase history days
fields.helpText: New customers below this history threshold are NOT offered RDR (higher fraud risk).

fields.name: evidence_auto_collect_on_create
fields.label: Auto-collect evidence on chargeback filed
fields.helpText: Pre-populates the evidence bundle from invoice + membership + notifications + support modules. Admin reviews + potentially edits before submission.

fields.name: evidence_deadline_reminder_cadence_days
fields.label: Deadline reminder cadence (days before)
fields.helpText: Days-before-deadline at which ChargebackEvidenceOverdue notifications fire.

fields.name: notify_admins_on_filed_channels
fields.label: Admin notification channels on chargeback filed
fields.helpText: P0 event — SMS included by default for immediate awareness. Tenant may drop SMS via override.

fields.name: notification_recipients
fields.label: Additional admin notification recipients
fields.helpText: Users to always notify on chargeback events. Overrides the default (any user holding chargebacks.viewAny permission).
